name: Dandelion and Lettuce Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the lettuce, dandelion greens, onions, pepper, and cheese into small pieces.
2. Add salt and black pepper to taste.
3. Mix well in a large bowl.
4. Stir in the olive oil and vinegar until combined.
5. Gently fold in the quartered tomatoes and sliced hard-boiled eggs so they are not mashed or broken.
